ConnectionStrings.//: Local development database. Matches the defaults in docker/docker-compose.yml. These are LOCAL dev credentials only, never production secrets.

Security.//: Dev runs over plain HTTP — no HTTPS redirect/HSTS. Static security headers stay on.

Cors.//: Local admin (Angular) and mobile web dev servers.

Encryption.//: DEV-ONLY AES key (base64 32 bytes) so Aadhaar encryption works locally. Production supplies this via a secret store.

Jwt.//: DEV-ONLY HS256 signing key so tokens can be issued locally. Production supplies this via a secret store (JWT_SIGNING_KEY) and startup fails without it.
